_comment: Known MCP servers documented across this plugin's skills/README. Edit this list when a skill starts (or stops) documenting a `claude mcp add ...` command. Consumed by mcp_status.py and mcp_register.py. The 'core' + 'docs-remote' category entries' config blocks are bundled directly in ../../.mcp.json (auto-registered for anyone who installs this plugin, zero per-user config needed) - keep those two in sync by hand if either changes. 'adt-alternative' and 'product-specific' entries stay opt-in via mcp_register.py, since they need a per-user choice (which ADT alternative) or per-user credentials/license files that can't be shared in a bundled config. 'dev-tool' entries (e.g. chrome-devtools) need no credential and CAN auto-run via mcp_register.py's Y/n prompt flow (same as adt-alternative) - but still stay OUT of the bundled .mcp.json, since they grant a real capability (controlling a live browser) that should not be silently active for every plugin user by default.

servers.name: sap-btp
servers.description: Main sap-btp-agent server: profiles, search, read source, activate

servers.name: sap-dict-bridge
servers.description: DDIC create (Domain/DataElement/Table) via sap-btp-agent's cookie auth

servers.name: cds-kb
servers.description: Remote CDS view knowledge base (7,355 views)

servers.name: mcp-sap-docs-btp
servers.description: Remote SAP Docs / API Hub / Help Portal search

servers.name: notion
servers.description: Notion workspace dung chung cho team (skill notes / knowledge base) qua Notion hosted MCP chinh chu (makenotion/notion-mcp-server) - moi nguoi tu OAuth tai khoan rieng qua /mcp, KHONG can luu token nao. Chia se workspace cho team lam o phia Notion (invite thanh vien vao page), khong lien quan file nay.

servers.name: arc-1
servers.description: Enterprise ADT MCP (XSUAA, audit log) - alternative to sap-btp

servers.name: mcp-abap-adt
servers.description: Community read-only ADT MCP (mario-andreschak) - needs its own basic auth

servers.name: mcp-abap-adt-dict
servers.description: Full-CRUD ADT MCP (fr0ster) - superseded by sap-dict-bridge, kept for reference

servers.name: sap-notes
servers.description: SAP Notes / KBA lookup (can clone + build)

config.install_hint: git clone https://github.com/marianfoo/sap-mcp-servers.git; cd packages/notes; npm install; npm run build; claude mcp add --transport stdio sap-notes -- node /abs/path/to/sap-mcp-servers/packages/notes/dist/mcp-server.js

servers.name: sap-gui
servers.description: SAP GUI Scripting automation (Windows, SAP GUI required)

config.install_hint: pip install uvx (neu chua co); claude mcp add --transport stdio sap-gui -- uvx mcp-sap-gui[screenshots] --read-only --allowed-transactions MM03 VA03 IW33
git clone https://github.com/aiadiguru2025/sf-mcp.git; cd sf-mcp; uv sync; claude mcp add --transport stdio sf-mcp -- uv --directory /path/to/sf-mcp run main.py

servers.name: sf-cdata
servers.description: SuccessFactors (CData SQL-based, read-only - can JDBC license)

config.install_hint: Tai CData JDBC driver + MCP jar tu CData; claude mcp add --transport stdio sf-cdata -- java -jar /path/to/CDataMCP-jar-with-dependencies.jar /path/to/.env/sap-successfactors.prp

servers.name: sap-concur
servers.description: Concur Travel & Expense (CData SQL-based - can JDBC license)

config.install_hint: Tai CData JDBC driver + MCP jar tu CData; claude mcp add --transport stdio sap-concur -- java -jar /path/to/CDataMCP-jar-with-dependencies.jar /path/to/.env/sap-concur.prp

servers.name: sap-fieldglass
servers.description: Fieldglass Services Procurement (CData SQL-based - can JDBC license)

config.install_hint: Tai CData JDBC driver + MCP jar tu CData; claude mcp add --transport stdio sap-fieldglass -- java -jar /path/to/CDataMCP-jar-with-dependencies.jar /path/to/.env/sap-fieldglass.prp

servers.name: chrome-devtools
servers.description: Chrome DevTools automation/debug (ChromeDevTools chinh chu, Google) - console/network/performance trace cho web, huu ich debug Fiori/UI5 chay tren browser. Khong can credential (chi can Node.js + Chrome cai san may) nhung van hoi Y/n truoc khi dang ky vi dieu khien browser that
